name: HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card
milestoneBenefits: 500 Reward Points on fee realisation, applicable only on payment of joining membership fee
Renewal membership fee waived on spending Rs 50,000 or more in a year before renewal
additionalBenefits: 10X CashPoints on BigBasket, BookMyShow, OYO, Swiggy and Uber
1 Reward Point for every Rs 150 spent
Additional CashPoints via PayZapp on utility bills, mobile recharges and more
Rs 1,000 CashPoints on shopping in-app over 200+ brands via PayZapp
10% additional discount on Swiggy Dineout using coupon code HDFCCARDS
1% fuel surcharge waiver at fuel stations across India on transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle
Up to 50 days interest-free credit period
Zero lost card liability when reported immediately

salaried: Gross monthly income greater than Rs 12,000
selfEmployed: ITR greater than Rs 2 lakh per annum
